OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_ID.description: The ID of the live stream to connect to.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_LISTEN_DELETE.description: Whether to listen for delete events on the live stream.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_NO_DEPENDENCIES.description: Whether to ignore dependencies when processing events from the live stream.

JIRA_URL.description: The URL of the JIRA server.

JIRA_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates when connecting to JIRA.

JIRA_LOGIN_EMAIL.description: The email address used to authenticate with JIRA.

JIRA_API_TOKEN.description: The API token used to authenticate with JIRA.

JIRA_PROJECT_KEY.description: The JIRA project key where issues will be created.

JIRA_ISSUE_TYPE_NAME.description: The issue type name to use when creating JIRA issues.

JIRA_CUSTOM_FIELDS_KEYS.description: Comma-separated list of custom field keys to set on created issues.

JIRA_CUSTOM_FIELDS_VALUES.description: Comma-separated list of custom field values corresponding to the keys.
